Hello! I Am Addagiri Spoorthi

A builder who
turns ideas into working software.

Because a strong idea deserves a clean system, a clear interface, and a launch-ready finish.

Currently

I'm a Software Engineer.

Computer Science Engineering student at SRM Institute of Science and Technology, focused on applied AI, full-stack interfaces, Android systems, and DSA-backed problem solving.

I build practical projects that connect model logic, database design, and usable product experiences. My work spans machine learning, NLP, React interfaces, Android development, and algorithm-heavy applications.

8.65 CGPA 2027 B.Tech CSE 5+ Project tracks

Experience

Work Experience

May 2025 - Jun 2025

Research Intern - North Chiang Mai University

Built a diabetes-risk prediction system with Python and Scikit-learn, covering preprocessing, feature selection, evaluation, and a ReactJS prediction interface.

Jan 2025 - Mar 2025

C and C++ with DSA Intern

Strengthened algorithmic programming through C, C++, dynamic programming, graph theory, OOP, and optimization-oriented implementations.

I'm currently looking to join a cross-functional team

that values useful software, accessible interfaces, and learning fast through real projects.

Selected Work

Featured Projects

Featured Project

FAQFlow AI

SaaS-style RAG chatbot generator that turns FAQ documents into conversational support bots with FastAPI, Next.js, ChromaDB, SQLite, and an embeddable widget flow.

FastAPI Next.js RAG SQLite
View repository

Android Project

PowerMonitor

Battery monitoring app for real-time usage tracking, background activity monitoring, SQLite persistence, and visual analytics for high-consumption apps.

Android SDK Java SQLite

Machine Learning

Credit Card Fraud Detection

Random Forest and SVM classifiers tuned to improve recall and reduce false negatives in transaction classification.

Scikit-learn Random Forest SVM

Algorithms

Maze Solver

Pathfinding application using graph traversal, DFS, BFS, stacks, and queues to compute valid and shortest routes.

DFS BFS Data Structures

IoT Concept

Smart Home Automation

Python-backed automation project connected to a public Vercel deployment and user-facing smart-home workflow.
